steps.title: Use both speed limits
steps.content: The speed varied between $168$ and $192$ miles per hour, so it must be at least $168$ and at most $192$.

steps.title: Write one compound inequality
steps.content:
Put the lower bound on the left and the upper bound on the right:
$$
168\leq s\leq 192
$$

steps.title: Match both bounds
steps.content: Choice D is the only choice that includes both the lower limit $168$ and the upper limit $192$. The answer is D.
